backlog.name: Omidyar Network

backlog.why: Funds AI and tech research; historically supported foundational work

backlog.why: AI safety and digital rights; AI accountability and open-source backing

backlog.name: Ford Foundation
backlog.why: AI accountability, algorithmic justice, and governance research
